test: PMAT-039: BFE byte extraction + contended 4090 comparison
contention: QLoRA training at 94% GPU util (9.6 GB VRAM)

comparison.bfe_impact: No measurable change under contention (154.6 ≈ 154.7 tok/s)
comparison.note: Contention from QLoRA (94% GPU util) dominates. Isolated test needed.

optimization.technique: PTX bfe.u32 with register start replaces shr_u32 + and_u32_imm(0xFF)
